learningGoal: User completes their Free Energy Blueprint and understands their Energy Type.
keyPoints: Enter your birth date, birth time, and birth location to generate your Free Energy Blueprint
Read your Energy Type: Generator, Manifesting Generator, Projector, Manifestor, or Reflector
Open your AI Synthesis and read the first three sections: Energy Type, Strategy, and Authority
Save your Blueprint to your dashboard so you can return to it at any time
toneNotes: Reassuring and grounded. This person is new. Do not overwhelm. Each step is concrete and completable in under two minutes.
